metadata.description: LoreKit — shared persistent memory for coding agents.

plugins.name: lorekit-memory
plugins.description: Reads scoped lessons at session start and nudges a retrospective when a tool fails, backed by the LoreKit MCP server. Requires LOREKIT_MCP_URL and LOREKIT_TOKEN in the environment (or a project .mcp.json written by `npx @lorekit/cli install`).
